lastAgentSummary: ## VPS Deploy Complete ✅ ### Containers Running | Name | Status | Limits | RSS | |---|---|---|---| | **mt5-combined** | ✅ Healthy (2 min) | 128 MB / 256 MB swap | ~64 MB | | **mt5-redis** | ✅ Healthy (27 min) | 64 MB / 128 MB swap | ~7 MB | | **Total** | | | **~71 MB** | ### Hermes Config ```yaml tradebridge: url: http://127.0.0.1:8010/mcp description: "MT5 Trading Bridge" ``` Updated to point to the MCP SSE endpoint at `/mcp` for standard protocol connectivity. ### Disk Cleaned - Removed Windmill directory + old Docker images/volumes - Disk: **43 GB total, 11 GB free (75%)** — up from 100% full ### Committed & Pushed FastMCP SSE app mount at `/mcp` — enables standard MCP protocol for Hermes/Claude connectivity. `main` branch pushed to both GitHub and GitLab. ### AI Agent Usage From Hermes, the agent connects to TradeBridge at the MCP SSE endpoint on port 8010. All 96 tools are registered and discoverable through the MCP protocol. Non-MT5 endpoints (policy, stats, ML models, system status) work immediately. MT5-dependent endpoints (positions, orders, account summary) will timeout gracefully until the MT5 terminal container is deployed (needs more disk space or background loading).
